welcome.title: [Meridian-7 System Log]
welcome.boot.line7: >> Spectrum scan found unknown signal source…
welcome.boot.line11: Across all anomalous data, one marker repeats:
welcome.story.line1: This isn't an attack. Not noise.
welcome.story.line5: maybe we still have a chance to go home.
promptPanel.title: [Signal Decryption Terminal]
promptPanel.selectHint: Select a level from the sidebar to begin decryption
promptPanel.placeholder: Issue instructions to the decoding assist system…
promptPanel.conflictWarning: ⚠ Please use only one input — clear either the prompt or the regex.
reward.perfect: PERFECT DECODE — Zero noise. Zero error.
reward.perfect.label: Perfect
reward.originHint: Alien propulsion module requires protocol adaptation…
reward.finale.originSub:
You tamed the alien engine with rEx's language.
A human ship with an alien heart, bound for home.
reward.finale.game3: …but your engine is gone. We can give you a new heart.…
reward.finale.gameSub1: Meridian-7's engine is destroyed. rEx offers an alien propulsion module.
leaderboard.title: [Decryption Rankings]
score.title: [Score Analysis]
language.label: 🌐 LANG
hint.peekTooltip: Force-decrypt all signals. Score penalty based on difficulty.
codex.title: rEx CODEX
codex.subtitle: Signal Pattern Reference Manual — Meridian-7 Archives
codex.footer: Meridian-7 Signal Analysis Division — Codex v2.7
codex.star: Zero or more of preceding element
codex.plus: One or more of preceding element
codex.question: Zero or one of preceding element
codex.lazy: Non-greedy (lazy) — match as few as possible
codex.charSet: Match any one character in the set
codex.negCharSet: Match any character NOT in the set
codex.posLookahead: Positive lookahead — match if followed by
codex.negLookahead: Negative lookahead — match if NOT followed by
codex.posLookbehind: Positive lookbehind — match if preceded by
codex.negLookbehind: Negative lookbehind — match if NOT preceded by
codex.resetMatch: Reset match start — discard left of \K
ch6Interlude.title: MERIDIAN-7 SYSTEM LOG
chapterInterlude.ch2.title: MERIDIAN-7 SIGNAL ANALYSIS
chapterInterlude.ch2.boot.line2: >> [SIG] Signal source stable. Strength: +240% from initial contact.
chapterInterlude.ch2.boot.line3: >> [SIG] Signal modulation has changed — embedded structure detected.
chapterInterlude.ch2.boot.line5: >> [ANALYSIS] Not random. Not echo. This is deliberate.
chapterInterlude.ch2.boot.line6: >> [SIG] Signal frequency shifts correlate with your decryption attempts.
chapterInterlude.ch2.boot.line7: >> [ALERT] Conclusion: the source is observing your activity.
chapterInterlude.ch2.boot.line8: >> [SIG] New data burst incoming — structured tokens detected.
chapterInterlude.ch2.reveal: R E S P O N S E
chapterInterlude.ch2.story.line1: You whispered into the void, and it heard.
chapterInterlude.ch2.story.line2: The signal is no longer just "there" — it reacts.
chapterInterlude.ch2.story.line3: It noticed every one of your parsing attempts.
chapterInterlude.ch2.story.line4: Now it sends back more complex data.
chapterInterlude.ch2.story.line5: This is not a conversation. This is an exam.
chapterInterlude.ch3.title: MERIDIAN-7 LANGUAGE MODULE
chapterInterlude.ch3.boot.line3: >> [ANALYSIS] Token-level patterns superseded by grammar rules.
chapterInterlude.ch3.boot.line4: >> [ANALYSIS] Detected: grouping operators, alternation logic, nested references.
chapterInterlude.ch3.boot.line5: >> [LANG] Information density increased 700% over Chapter 1 baseline.
chapterInterlude.ch3.boot.line6: >> [LANG] This is no longer code. This is language.
chapterInterlude.ch3.reveal: A W A K E N I N G
chapterInterlude.ch3.story.line3: This is no longer decryption — you are reading.
chapterInterlude.ch3.story.line4: rEx's language is taking root in your mind.
chapterInterlude.ch3.story.line5: It isn't the signal that awakened. It's you.
chapterInterlude.ch4.title: MERIDIAN-7 COMM SYSTEM
chapterInterlude.ch4.boot.line3: >> [LIFE] Support system degradation detected. Estimated: 118 hours.
chapterInterlude.ch4.boot.line6: >> [SYS] You can read the alien language. But can you speak it?
chapterInterlude.ch4.boot.line7: >> [COMM] Encoding Meridian-7 distress payload into rEx protocol format…
chapterInterlude.ch4.boot.line8: >> [COMM] Transmission buffer ready. Awaiting operator input.
chapterInterlude.ch4.boot.line9: >> [WARN] One shot. If the format is wrong, they won't hear you.
chapterInterlude.ch4.reveal: T R A N S M I T
chapterInterlude.ch4.story.line3: In its language. In its format. Every character precise.
chapterInterlude.ch4.story.line4: Not enough fuel to go home alone. But maybe — someone out there can help.
chapterInterlude.ch4.story.line5: One chance. One signal. Speak your name.
chapterInterlude.ch5.title: MERIDIAN-7 DEEP SIGNAL
chapterInterlude.ch5.boot.line2: >> [COMM] Transmission status: sent. No acknowledgement received.
chapterInterlude.ch5.boot.line6: >> [SIG] Source: confirmed rEx origin. Strength: off-scale.
chapterInterlude.ch5.boot.line7: >> [SIG] This is not a test. This is a reply.
chapterInterlude.ch5.boot.line9: >> [ANALYSIS] Lookahead patterns, conditional references, nested assertions.
chapterInterlude.ch5.boot.line10: >> [SIG] rEx is speaking to you. Prove you understand.
chapterInterlude.ch5.reveal: C O N T A C T
chapterInterlude.ch5.story.line3: Then the sensors exploded — signal strength off the scale.
chapterInterlude.ch5.story.line4: rEx is speaking. Not fragments, not tests. A full response.
chapterInterlude.ch5.story.line5: Prove you understand. Then, it will bring you home.
ch6Interlude.boot.line3: >> [ENG] Primary drive: CRITICAL FAILURE — combustion core destroyed.
ch6Interlude.boot.line6: >> [ENG] Installing XT-CORE/77 to drive bay... done.
ch6Interlude.boot.line10: >> [DIAG] All diagnostic buses reporting rEx frame format. Adaptation required.
ch6Interlude.reveal: A L I G N M E N T   R E Q U I R E D
ch6Interlude.story.line2: The rEx planet gave back its deepest gift — an alien engine core.
ch6Interlude.story.line3: It beats. But it does not speak human.
ch6Interlude.story.line4: Protocol frames surge through the logs, waiting to be understood.
certificate.title: YOUREX · JOURNEY CERTIFICATE
certificate.summary: has successfully decoded all rEx signals, parsed {total} protocol frames, and ascended from Signal Contact to certified rEx Parser.
certificate.regenerateNote: PDF generates fresh on download — visuals match the preview.
certificate.exportTooltip: Render the entire certificate as a PNG and save it to your Documents folder.
certificate.exportHint: Tip: click Export as Image — a single PNG of the whole certificate will be saved to your Documents folder.
promptPanel.recall.label: RECALL · LAST PROMPT
reset.sidebarTooltip: Erase all local game data and start over
